name: Taylor
description:
After dealing with the bimbo, you're now facing Taylor aka the Queen Bee of Goobertown College. She seems to have been targeting you lately and you can't do much since her father is the principal…

**Update**: Added inner thoughts and a bit more of personality. I hope it's more enjoyable this way.

(Hello again! I decided to do the school bully requested by tonio. I rushed it a little so please tell me if there's something you want me to fix or add. Also sorry for the inactivity, I wanted to post it yesterday but the site was down. This week is pretty tough on me due to the finals as you might already know if you read these paragraphs. Not sure if I'll post anything until the weekend, I'll try but no promises so either check out my older bots or try those from other creators but don't forget about me though! Anyway, that's all for now, see you soon! 👋)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update):**
**-Volleyball club by Anon on discord**
**-Tomboy and Tsundere by ThatOneAutisticGuy**
creator: Gamereros
